title: FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2025
body: " FOI publications have been temporarily paused on GOV.UK while a new publishing system is delivered. Direct responses will continue to be provided to requesters.   Correspondence will be processed in accordance with Information Rights legislation as quickly as possible, where priorities and resources allow, however there may be delays in processing some of these requests. Thank you for your patience.  Related information:   FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2024 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2023 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2022 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2021 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2020 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2019 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2018 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2017 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2016 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2015 FOI responses released by the Ministry of Defence: 2014   For responses released prior to June 2014 see our list of FOI releases.  Visit the UK Government Web Archive for FOI releases published prior to May 2010. "
